handles: creating → refuse if provider_price_id is set but does not exist at Stripe/Paddle (dry-run lookup)
deleting → refuse when active_subscription_count > 0 unless force flag + super_admin
creating → populate ULID prefix `sub_` + denormalise application_id + billing_cycle from Plan
creating → refuse if tenant already has non-terminal Subscription
created → fire SubscriptionStarted + create initial SubscriptionEvent(kind=started)
updating (state changed) → fire the matching state event + create SubscriptionEvent
updating (plan_id changed) → fire SubscriptionUpgraded/Downgraded/Switched by comparing Plan.tier ordering + create SubscriptionEvent
